prompt: Which courses have been offered in the most sections overall?

{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Which courses have been offered in the most sections overall?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Which courses have been offered in the most sections overall?"},"startedAt":1771856131731,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The question asks for courses with the most sections overall. I need to join the courses table with course_sections, group by course, count the sections, and order by count descending. The courses table has id and name; course_sections has course_id. I'll count distinct sections per course and return the course name and section count.","sql":"
SELECT 
  c.name AS course_name,
  c.code AS course_code,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code
ORDER BY section_count DESC
","assumptions":["Assuming 'sections overall' means counting all course_sections records associated with each course across all semesters and years","Assuming we want to see all courses ranked by section count, not just the top one"]},"endedAt":1771856149589},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

visualization.title: Courses by Number of Sections Offered
visualization.description: Bar chart showing which courses have been offered in the most sections overall

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  c.name AS course_name,
  c.code AS course_code,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code
ORDER BY section_count DESC

visualization.title: Courses by Number of Sections Offered
visualization.description: Bar chart showing which courses have been offered in the most sections overall

result.sql:
SELECT 
  c.name AS course_name,
  c.code AS course_code,
  COUNT(cs.id) AS section_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON c.id = cs.course_id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code
ORDER BY section_count DESC
